channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to Safely Remove a Tick
Spinal instability may be the primary cause of pain in sacral metastases as opposed to neurologic compromise
item.description: 1. Although neurological symptoms (motor deficits, sensory impairment) were more common in patients with sitting-related sacral pain on univariate c...

item.title: Don't Fall for These Cholesterol Myths
Foundayo (Orforglipron) Approval Marks the Beginning of the Oral GLP-1 Era for Obesity Treatment
item.description: 1. The FDA approved orforglipron (Foundayo) on April 1, 2026, making it the first non-peptide oral GLP-1 receptor agonist cleared for obesity treatmen...
